feat: Add unit tests for date formatting functions

- Create date-formatting.test.mjs with 12 tests
- Tests formatDateForFilename (YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS for filenames)
- Tests formatDateForJson (ISO 8601 for JSON output)
- Total test count now 122 (up from 110)

Part of test coverage epic (get_icloud_image_link-qoh)
